requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 220 V / 50 Hz, Type C and Type F Plug (European Standard)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——220V/50Hz，C型及F型插头（欧洲标准）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——220V/50Hz，C型及F型插頭（歐洲標準）

summary.en: Afghanistan operates on a 220 V / 50 Hz power supply. Wall outlets accept Type C (Europlug, 2-round-pin) and Type F (Schuko, 2-round-pin with side grounding clips) plugs — the European standard. Although Afghanistan shares China mains voltage (220 V) and frequency (50 Hz), Afghanistan uses European-style plug types (C/F) rather than Chinese plug type I or type A. Wireless devices with mains power supply (chargers, adapters, AC-connected base stations) must comply with Afghan electrical safety requirements and must be supplied with Type C or Type F compatible plugs or adapters. Electrical safety test evidence to IEC 60950-1 or IEC 62368-1 (the international standard for audio/video, IT, and communications equipment) is expected as part of the ATRA type approval technical file.
summary.zh: 阿富汗采用220V/50Hz电源。墙壁插座兼容C型（欧洲式，双圆针）和F型（Schuko，双圆针带侧接地夹）插头——欧洲标准。尽管阿富汗与中国电网电压（220V）和频率（50Hz）相同，但阿富汗使用欧洲式插头类型（C/F）而非中国I型或A型插头。配有市电电源（充电器、适配器、交流连接基站）的无线设备须符合阿富汗电气安全要求，并须配备C型或F型兼容插头或适配器。符合IEC 60950-1或IEC 62368-1（音视频、IT及通信设备国际标准）的电气安全测试证据，应作为ATRA型号认证技术文件的一部分提交。
summary.zht: 阿富汗採用220V/50Hz電源。牆壁插座兼容C型（歐洲式，雙圓針）和F型（Schuko，雙圓針帶側接地夾）插頭——歐洲標準。儘管阿富汗與中國電網電壓（220V）和頻率（50Hz）相同，但阿富汗使用歐洲式插頭類型（C/F）而非中國I型或A型插頭。配有市電電源（充電器、適配器、交流連接基站）的無線設備須符合阿富汗電氣安全要求，並須配備C型或F型兼容插頭或適配器。符合IEC 60950-1或IEC 62368-1（音視頻、IT及通訊設備國際標準）的電氣安全測試證據，應作為ATRA型號認證技術文件的一部分提交。

standards_or_laws: Afghanistan Telecommunications Law 2012 (ATRA technical file requirements)
ANSA — Afghanistan National Standards Authority electrical safety references
IEC 62368-1 (Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — safety)
IEC 60950-1 (Safety of information technology equipment — legacy reference)
CEE 7/4 and CEE 7/5 (Type F and Type E plug / socket standards)

summary.en: In China, electrical safety for IT and communications equipment is governed by GB 4943.1 (Safety of IT equipment) and increasingly by GB/T 42296 (aligned with IEC 62368-1). CCC certification requires electrical safety testing to GB standards. Chinese products are designed for 220 V / 50 Hz but typically ship with Chinese Type I (three-flat-pin) or Type A (two-flat-pin) plugs, which are not compatible with Afghan Type C/F sockets without an adapter.
summary.zh: 在中国，IT及通信设备的电气安全依据GB 4943.1（IT设备安全）执行，并逐步采用GB/T 42296（与IEC 62368-1对标）。CCC认证要求按GB标准进行电气安全测试。中国产品设计为220V/50Hz，但通常配备中国I型（三扁针）或A型（双扁针）插头，与阿富汗C/F型插座不兼容，需使用适配器。
summary.zht: 在中國，IT及通訊設備的電氣安全依據GB 4943.1（IT設備安全）執行，並逐步採用GB/T 42296（與IEC 62368-1對標）。CCC認證要求按GB標準進行電氣安全測試。中國產品設計為220V/50Hz，但通常配備中國I型（三扁針）或A型（雙扁針）插頭，與阿富汗C/F型插座不兼容，需使用適配器。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 42296 (IEC 62368-1 aligned, audio/video and IT equipment safety — China)

gap.en: Although Afghanistan and China share 220 V / 50 Hz mains voltage and frequency (no voltage converter required), Chinese plug types (Type I, Type A) are not compatible with Afghan Type C / Type F sockets. Products must be supplied with Type C or Type F compatible plugs or internationally compatible (universal) adapters for the Afghanistan market. Electrical safety test evidence to IEC 62368-1 or IEC 60950-1 is required in the ATRA technical file; Chinese GB 4943.1 test reports may be acceptable if they are substantially equivalent and accepted by ATRA, but this must be confirmed with ATRA. CCC certification alone is not a substitute for ATRA type approval.
gap.zh: 尽管阿富汗与中国同为220V/50Hz电网电压和频率（无需电压转换器），但中国插头类型（I型、A型）与阿富汗C/F型插座不兼容。面向阿富汗市场的产品须配备C型或F型兼容插头或国际通用适配器。ATRA技术文件要求提供符合IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1的电气安全测试证据；中国GB 4943.1测试报告如实质等效且被ATRA接受，可能适用，但须向ATRA确认。CCC认证单独不可替代ATRA型号认证。
gap.zht: 儘管阿富汗與中國同為220V/50Hz電網電壓和頻率（無需電壓轉換器），但中國插頭類型（I型、A型）與阿富汗C/F型插座不兼容。面向阿富汗市場的產品須配備C型或F型兼容插頭或國際通用適配器。ATRA技術文件要求提供符合IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1的電氣安全測試證據；中國GB 4943.1測試報告如實質等效且被ATRA接受，可能適用，但須向ATRA確認。CCC認證單獨不可替代ATRA型號認證。

source.publisher: ATRA — Afghanistan Telecom Regulatory Authority; ANSA — Afghanistan National Standards Authority

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Afghanistan uses 220 V / 50 Hz (same as China) but Type C and Type F plugs (European — not Chinese Type I or Type A). Mains-connected wireless devices must be supplied with Type C/F compatible plugs for Afghanistan. Electrical safety test evidence to IEC 62368-1 or IEC 60950-1 is required in the ATRA type approval technical file.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿富汗使用220V/50Hz（与中国相同），但采用C型和F型插头（欧洲式——非中国I型或A型）。面向阿富汗市场的市电连接无线设备须配备C/F型兼容插头。ATRA型号认证技术文件要求提供符合IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1的电气安全测试证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿富汗使用220V/50Hz（與中國相同），但採用C型和F型插頭（歐洲式——非中國I型或A型）。面向阿富汗市場的市電連接無線設備須配備C/F型兼容插頭。ATRA型號認證技術文件要求提供符合IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1的電氣安全測試證據。
